requirement_topic.en: OCPP, Remote Monitoring, and IEC 61000 EMC / Power Quality
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、远程监控及IEC 61000 EMC / 电能质量
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、遠程監控及IEC 61000 EMC / 電能品質

summary.en: Nepal's public charging infrastructure is growing through NEA and private operators, so networked chargers should be prepared for charge-point-operator back-office integration, remote monitoring, billing, fault reporting, and load management. OCPP is not confirmed as a nationwide official Nepal mandate from public sources, but it is the normal interoperability protocol for multi-vendor networked charging projects and may be required by NEA projects, private CPOs, lenders, or site owners. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared under IEC 61000 for emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and conducted disturbances, especially where DC fast chargers are connected to constrained feeders.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔公共充电基础设施正通过NEA和私营运营商持续增长，因此联网充电桩应准备充电点运营商后台集成、远程监控、计费、故障报告和负载管理能力。公开来源未确认OCPP为尼泊尔全国官方强制要求，但其是多供应商联网充电项目通常采用的互操作协议，并可能由NEA项目、私营CPO、贷款方或场地方要求。EMC和电能质量证据应依据IEC 61000准备，覆盖发射、抗扰度、谐波、闪变和传导骚扰，尤其适用于接入受限馈线的直流快充。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾公共充電基礎設施正通過NEA和私營運營商持續增長，因此聯網充電樁應準備充電點運營商後台集成、遠程監控、計費、故障報告和負載管理能力。公開來源未確認OCPP為尼泊爾全國官方強制要求，但其是多供應商聯網充電項目通常採用的互操作協議，並可能由NEA項目、私營CPO、貸款方或場地方要求。EMC和電能品質證據應依據IEC 61000準備，覆蓋發射、抗擾度、諧波、閃變和傳導騷擾，尤其適用於接入受限饋線的直流快充。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and power quality
OCPP — project-level back-office interoperability protocol for networked chargers
NEA or charge-point-operator remote monitoring, metering, billing, and load-management requirements
IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required for CCS2 DC communication

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. GB/T 27930 is a DC charger-to-vehicle CAN protocol, not a CPO back-office protocol. China AC or DC chargers may support proprietary cloud systems or OCPP depending on manufacturer and operator, but GB/T communication and proprietary platforms do not automatically satisfy Nepal project interoperability, cybersecurity, billing, or remote-monitoring requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信协议。GB/T 27930是直流充电桩至车辆的CAN协议，不是CPO后台协议。中国交流或直流充电桩可能根据制造商和运营商支持私有云系统或OCPP，但GB/T通信和私有平台不会自动满足尼泊尔项目的互操作、网络安全、计费或远程监控要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。GB/T 27930是直流充電樁至車輛的CAN協議，不是CPO後台協議。中國交流或直流充電樁可能根據製造商和運營商支持私有雲系統或OCPP，但GB/T通訊和私有平台不會自動滿足尼泊爾項目的互操作、網絡安全、計費或遠程監控要求。

standards_or_laws: China EMC testing under applicable GB/T standards

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the required OCPP version, server profile, charger identity and SIM/network arrangement, payment and billing interfaces, logging and fault-reporting fields, load-management functions, and cybersecurity requirements with the Nepal CPO or project owner. For CCS2 DC chargers, confirm whether IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication is required. Prepare IEC 61000 EMC and harmonic reports rather than relying only on China domestic EMC evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商应向尼泊尔CPO或项目业主确认所需OCPP版本、服务器配置、充电桩身份和SIM/网络安排、支付和计费接口、日志和故障报告字段、负载管理功能及网络安全要求。对于CCS2直流充电桩，应确认是否要求IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信。应准备IEC 61000 EMC和谐波报告，而非仅依赖中国国内EMC证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應向尼泊爾CPO或項目業主確認所需OCPP版本、伺服器配置、充電樁身份和SIM/網絡安排、支付和計費接口、日誌和故障報告字段、負載管理功能及網絡安全要求。對於CCS2直流充電樁，應確認是否要求IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊。應準備IEC 61000 EMC和諧波報告，而非僅依賴中國國內EMC證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — OCPP is required where specified by NEA, CPO, tender, lender, or site owner; IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence is expected for grid-connected equipment review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC vehicle communication but is not a Nepal back-office interoperability or EMC substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not equate GB/T 27930 or a Chinese proprietary cloud with Nepal network readiness. Confirm OCPP and back-office requirements with the Nepal CPO or project owner, and provide IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence for NEA and site review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将GB/T 27930或中国私有云等同于尼泊尔联网就绪。应向尼泊尔CPO或项目业主确认OCPP和后台要求，并提供IEC 61000 EMC及电能质量证据供NEA和场地审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將GB/T 27930或中國私有雲等同於尼泊爾聯網就緒。應向尼泊爾CPO或項目業主確認OCPP和後台要求，並提供IEC 61000 EMC及電能品質證據供NEA和場地審查。
